'''mayazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oedipism|oedipism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oedipism|oedipism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mayazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyæzhæth|mæyæzhæth]] || [[word:mæyæzhæj|mæyæzhæj]] || [[word:mæyæzhæsh|mæyæzhæsh]] || [[word:mæyæzhæ|mæyæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayayazhath|mayayazhath]] || [[word:mayayazhaj|mayayazhaj]] || [[word:mayayazhash|mayayazhash]] || [[word:mayayazha|mayayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayazhath|mayazhath]] || [[word:mayazhaj|mayazhaj]] || [[word:mayazhash|mayazhash]] || [[word:mayazha|mayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayafzhafth|mayafzhafth]] || [[word:mayafzhafj|mayafzhafj]] || [[word:mayafzhafsh|mayafzhafsh]] || [[word:mayafzhaf|mayafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayazhatha|mayazhatha]] || [[word:mayazhaja|mayazhaja]] || [[word:mayazhasha|mayazhasha]] || [[word:mayazhaka|mayazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayazhath|mayazhath]] || [[word:mayazhaj|mayazhaj]] || [[word:mayazhash|mayazhash]] || [[word:mayazha|mayazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayazhathal|mayazhathal]] || [[word:mayazhajal|mayazhajal]] || [[word:mayazhashal|mayazhashal]] || [[word:mayazhakal|mayazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayazhaathatha|mayazhaathatha]] || [[word:mayazhaajaja|mayazhaajaja]] || [[word:mayazhaashasha|mayazhaashasha]] || [[word:mayazhaaka|mayazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayazhathan|mayazhathan]] || [[word:mayazhajan|mayazhajan]] || [[word:mayazhashan|mayazhashan]] || [[word:mayazhakan|mayazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayazhathaoro|mayazhathaoro]] || [[word:mayazhajaoro|mayazhajaoro]] || [[word:mayazhashaoro|mayazhashaoro]] || [[word:mayazhakaoro|mayazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
